title: [InstCombine] Fold lshr(add(or(shl X, C), K), C) when K uses only low bits
author: ZY546
description:
Extend the existing transform:
   
((X << C) + Y) >>u C
  -> (X + (Y >>u C)) & (-1 >>u C)

to also handle:

(((X << C) | K) + Y) >>u C
  -> (X + ((Y + K) >>u C)) & (-1 >>u C)

when K only sets bits below C (i.e. K >> C == 0).

This is valid because the low C bits of (X << C) are known zero, so or-ing with K is equivalent to adding a low-bit bias that is shifted out by the final logical right shift.

Proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/MxZzxR
Fixed: #193904

tests.test_body:
define i8 @lshr_add_or_low_bias_commuted(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %shl = shl i8 %x, 1
  %biased = or i8 %shl, 1
  %add = add i8 %y, %biased
  %lshr = lshr i8 %add, 1
  ret i8 %lshr
}

declare void @use(i8)

define i8 @lshr_add_or_low_bias_extra_or_use(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %shl = shl i8 %x, 1
  %biased = or i8 %shl, 1
  call void @use(i8 %biased)
  %add = add i8 %biased, %y
  %lshr = lshr i8 %add, 1
  ret i8 %lshr
}

define i8 @filter14_like(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %reass.add = shl i32 %x, 1
  %biased = or i32 %reass.add, 1
  %sum = add i32 %biased, %y
  %shr = lshr i32 %sum, 1
  %tr = trunc i32 %shr to i8
  ret i8 %tr
}

define i8 @lshr_add_or_max_low_bias(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %shl = shl i8 %x, 2
  %biased = or i8 %shl, 3
  %add = add i8 %biased, %y
  %lshr = lshr i8 %add, 2
  ret i8 %lshr
}

declare void @use(i8)

define i8 @lshr_add_or_low_bias_extra_shl_use(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %shl = shl i8 %x, 1
  call void @use(i8 %shl)
  %biased = or i8 %shl, 1
  %add = add i8 %biased, %y
  %lshr = lshr i8 %add, 1
  ret i8 %lshr
}

define i32 @lshr_add_or_not_low_bias(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %shl = shl i32 %x, 1
  %biased = or i32 %shl, 2
  %add = add i32 %biased, %y
  %lshr = lshr i32 %add, 1
  ret i32 %lshr
}

define i32 @lshr_add_or_low_bias(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %shl = shl i32 %x, 1
  %biased = or i32 %shl, 1
  %add = add i32 %biased, %y
  %lshr = lshr i32 %add, 1
  ret i32 %lshr
}
